leadText: The Muscle Band (Japanese: ちからのハチマキ Power Headband) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It boosts the power of the holder's physical moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's physical moves by 10% (approximated as a multiplier of 4505/4096 from Generation V to Pokémon Scarlet and Violet ).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a headband that slightly boosts the power of physical moves. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This headband exudes strength, slightly boosting the power of physical moves. S V ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This headband exudes strength, slightly boosting the power of the holder's physical moves.
